title: Lewis Hamilton’s Hidden Throttle Technique Explained | F1 Telemetry Breakdown
description:
Lewis Hamilton’s Hidden Throttle Technique Explained | F1 Telemetry Breakdown

What makes Lewis Hamilton so consistently fast in Formula 1?
It’s not just talent. It’s not just experience. It might come down to something most fans never see — throttle control.

In this deep technical breakdown, we analyze the hidden driving technique behind Hamilton’s legendary race pace. Using real-world F1 telemetry concepts, we explore how progressive throttle application affects traction, tire temperatures, r

title: 2026 F1 Engine & Battery Deployement Explained (MGU-K)
description:
F1 2026 just introduced one tiny word in the regulations — “pending” — and it completely changes how drivers use the throttle on corner exit.

In this video I break down what a power-limited pending period actually means in driver language, why the car no longer gives a sudden hybrid “kick”, and how the 150kW rule forces drivers to commit to throttle earlier instead of waiting for a boost moment.

You’ll learn:
• What “power-limited” vs “traction-limited” really feels like in the car
• Why the b

title: F1 2026 Explained: New Rules, New Engines  and a Possible Downfall? #automobile #f1technology
description:
The Formula 1 2026 regulations will launch a completely new era of F1. New engine rules, major aerodynamic changes, sustainable fuel innovations, and a potential shake-up of the competitive order.

But will this revolution bring closer racing and new legends… or create another era of domination and unexpected downfall?

In this video we break down:

The new F1 2026 technical regulations

The new power unit changes and hybrid system

Which teams could dominate

Which teams are at serious risk

Our latest video explains that surprise and where Ferrari stands ahead of the next pre-season test.
